title: High Blood Pressure
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support for hypertension basics and crisis thresholds. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: High blood pressure is common and may not cause symptoms.
Blood pressure of 180 systolic or higher or 120 diastolic or higher is a hypertensive crisis threshold that needs medical care right away.
Lifestyle changes and clinician-directed medications are common parts of blood pressure management.
